# Sa

**Summary**: A probabilistic technique for approximating the global optimum of a given objective function by mimicking the annealing process.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-adeniji|Adeniji, 2015]] used SA to estimate deformation parameters in GDM.

## Key Results and Findings

- SA performed best in 3 out of 7 realizations, showing higher reliability than LM. ([[2015-adeniji|Adeniji, 2015, p. 136]])
